name: tinc-workbench
description: TINC Workbench Core Engine and Schematic Editor
author: TINC Engineering

scripts.test: node -e "const args = process.argv.slice(2).filter(a => a !== '--run' && a !== '--'); const cp = require('child_process'); const res = cp.spawnSync('jest', args, { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); process.exit(res.status ?? 0);" --
